description: Tappable button that triggers an action

title.description: Button label text; defaults to empty

systemImage.description: SF Symbol name for a leading icon

materialName.description: (Android only; author as materialName:android) Material Symbol name, the Android stand-in for systemImage

materialWeight.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'wght' axis, 100..700; defaults to 400

materialFill.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'FILL' axis, 0..1 (or boolean); defaults to 0

materialGrade.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'GRAD' axis, -50..200; defaults to 0

materialSize.description: (Android only) explicit icon size in sp; defaults to the imageScale-scaled label font size

edge.description: Only inside a swipeActions array: which edge this swipe action sits on; defaults to 'trailing'

allowsFullSwipe.description: Only inside a swipeActions array: whether a full swipe of that edge triggers its first button; defaults to true
